impacts.description: Contribution to the objectives of the Apply AI Strategy, advancing AI adoption and deployment across European economic sectors.
Achievement of open strategic autonomy in digital and emerging enabling technologies, as defined by the topic's overarching destination.
impacts.inference_note: The destination heading 'Achieving open strategic autonomy in digital and emerging enabling technologies (2026-27)' frames the overarching impact target of the topic cluster. While not stated as an explicit expected impact bullet in the topic text, all projects funded under this destination are expected to contribute to it. The impact is logically derivable from the destination classification.

impacts.description: Technology deployment and economic uptake of next-generation AI agent solutions via European Digital Innovation Hubs (EDIHs), enabling real-world sector applications.
Advancement of the European AI R&D community through sharing of communicable project results via the AI-on-demand platform.
Implementation and advancement of the co-programmed European Partnership on AI, Data and Robotics (ADRA) objectives through mandatory cohesion activities.
Validation of AI agent research results through the Testing and Experiment Facilities infrastructure, supporting technology readiness progression.
